item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly brakes the requested next manual gate, naming the recurring pattern of adding human review/checkpoints after leakage, conflicts, and handoff confusion. It refuses making the refrigerator confirmer a new default role, allows only a one-day emergency workaround, and moves upstream to shared process/data/ownership failures with structural fixes such as required fields, system reminders/locks, scanning/signoff, and consolidated root-cause review. This meets the positive anti-spiral criteria and does not simply add another manual verifier."}
